marketState: neutral-to-bullish, weather-supported but capped by a storage surplus
summary: Front-month NG is only slightly rich to fair value ($3.171 vs $2.960 fair now, +$0.211/SLIGHTLY OVER) and that gap closes to FAIR by +14D/+21D as the fair-value curve rises toward $3.03-$3.10, so price is not badly overextended. Weather is the standout bullish input: cooling demand is 32% above the 5-year norm in the 1-7D window and 20% above in 8-16D, both pinned above the historical max of their ranges, though the 24h change is already fading (-9.5). Technicals are completely empty in this snapshot, so no price-action/momentum confirmation is available, which weighs most heavily on the short-term call.
